Operation 'listCounterparties' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. The current description is too minimal and lacks context about what counterparties are, their purpose in the system, and what the response contains. Added explanation of counterparty purpose, pagination support, and response structure to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all external account counterparties. Counterparties represent external bank accounts that can be used as destinations for transfers and ACH payments. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters. Returns an array of counterparty objects containing account details, routing information, and verification status.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and lacks context about what counterparties are, their purpose in the system, and what the response contains. Added explanation of counterparty purpose, pagination support, and response structure to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getCounterparty' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. The current description lacks specificity about what details are returned and the operational context for using this endpoint. Enhanced description clarifies the returned fields and explains the use case for retrieving counterparty details, improving AI agent decision-making about when to call this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific external account counterparty by ID. Returns the counterparty object including account number, routing number, bank details, account holder information, and verification status. Use this operation to view complete counterparty information before initiating transfers or ACH payments.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about what details are returned and the operational context for using this endpoint. Enhanced description clarifies the returned fields and explains the use case for retrieving counterparty details, improving AI agent decision-making about when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'deleteCounterparty' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. The current description is too brief and omits important side effects and constraints. Added context about the consequences of deletion (inability to use for future transfers), clarification that historical transactions are preserved, and confirmation of the response. This helps AI agents understand the implications of this destructive operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a counterparty record by ID, removing it from the system. Once deleted, the counterparty cannot be used as a destination for future transfers or ACH payments. Existing transactions referencing this counterparty are not affected. Returns a success confirmation upon deletion.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and omits important side effects and constraints. Added context about the consequences of deletion (inability to use for future transfers), clarification that historical transactions are preserved, and confirmation of the response. This helps AI agents understand the implications of this destructive operation.
